name: Artichoke Rice Salad with Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 package Rice pilaf mix OR Chicken rice mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice according to package directions; let it cool.
2. Drain the artichoke bottoms and reserve the liquid. Drain the olives and discard their liquid.
3. Chop the drained artichoke bottoms, olives, onions, and pepper.
4. Add the chopped ingredients to the cooled rice and mix well.
5. Make the dressing by combining the marinade from the artichokes with the other dressing ingredients (mayonnaise, curry powder).
6. Toss the dressing with the rice salad.
7. Refrigerate for 1 hour before serving.
